title: AetherMint Launchpad
description: A cinematic NFT minting landing page with phased reveal sections, collection details, FAQ, and admin-editable dataset content.
problem: NFT teams needed a premium launch page that felt cinematic but stayed simple to update before mint day.
solution: Built a dataset-driven HTMX experience with collection sections, mint-flow presentation, roadmap, FAQ, and rich animated UI states.
result: Reduced launch-page complexity and created a reusable structure for future collection drops.

title: YieldScope Analytics
description: A DeFi protocol analytics interface showing pool metrics, staking cards, APY explainers, and protocol documentation pages.
problem: A DeFi concept needed a clear dashboard interface to explain yield, risk, pools, and protocol value.
solution: Designed modular metric cards, protocol panels, APY explanation sections, and a backend-ready architecture for future API data.
result: Created a prototype that can evolve into a production analytics dashboard.

title: DAO Compass
description: A governance portfolio concept with proposal cards, role summaries, contributor profiles, and voting flow wireframes.
problem: DAO contributors needed a more readable way to understand proposals, roles, and governance activity.
solution: Created governance cards, contributor profile patterns, lifecycle steps, and onboarding-focused information architecture.
result: Improved proposal discoverability and made DAO participation easier to explain.

title: Contract Atlas
description: A verified contract showcase system for displaying networks, audit notes, explorer links, and integration examples.
problem: Smart contract work is often hidden in explorers and difficult for clients to understand.
solution: Built a contract showcase format with networks, addresses, audit notes, security context, and explorer links.
result: Turned technical contract data into a presentable portfolio asset.

title: zkIdentity Landing
description: A privacy-focused landing page for a zero-knowledge identity startup with animated architecture diagrams and waitlist capture.
problem: A zero-knowledge identity concept needed a trust-focused landing page with a privacy-first message.
solution: Designed a dark, minimal interface with architecture explainers, waitlist CTA, and animated depth effects.
result: Created a strong early-stage landing page for product validation.

title: TokenForge Brand Site
description: A token project website with tokenomics sections, roadmap, team cards, documentation links, and responsive animations.
problem: Token projects need clear tokenomics, roadmap, and trust sections without overwhelming visitors.
solution: Built a dataset-driven brand site with tokenomics blocks, roadmap, team cards, and documentation links.
result: Delivered a reusable token-site structure for fast campaign launches.
